allow: Bash(awk '{sum += $5} END {printf "Total chunks: %d files\\nTotal size: %.2f MB\\n", NR, sum/1024/1024}')
Bash(awk '{sum += $5; count++} END {printf "All JS files: %d\\nTotal size: %.2f MB\\n", count, sum/1024/1024}')

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const c=fs.readFileSync\('../frontend/.next/static/chunks/0c5zbmuqni2uc.js','utf8'\); const matches=c.match\(/[\\"']\(\\/[a-zA-Z\\/\\-_]+\)[\\"']/g\)||[]; const paths=[...new Set\(matches\)].filter\(p=>p.length>5&&p.length<80\); console.log\(paths.slice\(0,30\).join\('\\n'\)\);")

Bash(node -e " const data = require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); const manifest = JSON.parse\(data\); const pages = manifest.pages || {}; Object.entries\(pages\).forEach\(\([page, chunks]\) => { const size = chunks.reduce\(\(sum, c\) => { try { return sum + require\('fs'\).statSync\('../frontend/.next/' + c\).size; } catch { return sum; } }, 0\); console.log\(\(size/1024\).toFixed\(1\).padStart\(8\) + ' KB ' + page\); }\).sort\(\); ")

Bash(node -e " const fs = require\('fs'\); const manifest = JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('../frontend/.next/app-path-routes-manifest.json', 'utf8'\)\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(manifest, null, 2\)\); ")
